_meta.title: NuestraRx <-> Dosable - valid_options canonicas (tenant 64 Weightloss)
_meta.purpose: Mapa fechado das perguntas de opcao do questionario Dosable. Cada radio/checkbox/consent SO aceita as strings exatas listadas em valid_options[].value. Use para a IA do WhatsApp normalizar a fala do lead -> string exata antes de chamar /ai-handoff.
_meta.source: public/dosable-config.js (verificado contra GET /api/dosable/questions/?tenant_id=64) - enviado pelo Willian 2026-06-17

_contract.regra_de_ouro: Para perguntas de opcao (radio/checkbox/consent) a IA NUNCA deve enviar a fala crua do lead. Deve enviar SOMENTE uma das strings exatas em valid_options[].value (case e pontuacao identicos).
_contract.como_a_ia_deve_decidir: 1) normalize o texto do lead (minusculo, sem acento, sem pontuacao, trim); 2) tente casar com aliases_es / value; 3) se nao houver match confiante, NAO chute: reperguntar ao lead. Se usar LLM, prenda a saida a um enum das chaves (key), nunca texto livre.
_contract.checkbox: valid_options pode receber MAIS DE UMA opcao -> enviar como array de strings exatas. Se nenhuma se aplica, enviar a opcao 'None'.
_contract.hard_stop: Opcao marcada is_disqualifying=true reprova o lead. So avance o lead se a resposta NAO for disqualifying.
_contract.formato_no_ai_handoff: answers: { "<question_id>": { "value": "<string exata ou array>", "question": "<texto da pergunta>" } }
_contract.nao_normalizamos_no_worker: O /ai-handoff repassa o value verbatim pro Dosable. Quem valida opcao fechada e o Dosable. As unicas normalizacoes do worker sao telefone (digitos, ultimos 10) e birthday (MM/DD/YYYY).

valid_options.value: I acknowledge that I have read and understood the above information

questions.format: Apenas numero em libras (lbs). Converter kg->lbs se necessario.
ESTRITO feet'inches" ex: 5'10" . cm precisa ser convertido.

valid_options.value: I acknowledge that I have read and understood the above information

questions.question_en: Do you have any of the following conditions?
questions.note: Lista completa de opcoes esta na API de questoes do Dosable. A unica opcao nao-disqualifying verificada que usamos e 'None of the above'. Varias condicoes desta lista REPROVAM o lead - na duvida, registre como texto livre em 6400 e use 'None of the above' aqui apenas se realmente nenhuma se aplica.

questions.question_en: Gastric bypass in the past 6 months?
Do you have any drug allergies?
questions.note: Alergia a GLP-1 reprova. Lista completa na API Dosable. Opcao nao-disqualifying verificada: 'None of the above'.

questions.question_en: GLP-1 medications taken in the past two months
questions.note: Se != 'None of these', DESBLOQUEIA o branch de historico de dose (6419-6428) que passa a ser OBRIGATORIO.

questions.question_en: Are you able to self-inject (or have reliable help)?
questions.note: EXEMPLO DO BUG REPORTADO: 'No, me asistian en clinica' = tem ajuda confiavel -> mapeia para 'yes', NAO para o texto cru.

valid_options.value: Yes, I can inject myself or have reliable help
No, I'd need an oral option instead (Direct to oral formulation or disqualified if not offered)

questions.question_en: When did you last take your prescribed weight loss medication?

valid_options.value: It has been over a month

questions.question_en: Consent: dose reduction after a break
questions.branch: Somente quando lastDoseTiming='Within the past 2-3 weeks'

valid_options.value: I understand and agree to the dose reduction

questions.branch: Somente quando lastDoseTiming='It has been over a month'

valid_options.value: I understand and agree to the dose reduction

questions.question_en: Approximate date of your last dose
Which medication and dose most closely matches your most recent dose?

valid_options.value: I'm taking a brand name medication

questions.question_en: How are you responding to your medication?

valid_options.value: I'm not feeling any effects and have no side effects
aliases_es: no siento efecto y sin efectos secundarios

valid_options.value: I'm not feeling any effects but I'm having side effects
aliases_es: no siento efecto pero tengo efectos secundarios

valid_options.value: I'm feeling the effects but have side effects
aliases_es: siento efecto pero con efectos secundarios

valid_options.value: I'm feeling the effects and have no side effects

questions.question_en: How would you like to continue your treatment?

valid_options.value: Stay at the same or closest equivalent dose
Increase the dose if possible, or continue current if already at maximum

questions.question_en: Do you have your prescription/dose information?

valid_options.value: I don't have this information and I'm okay restarting
aliases_es: no la tengo pero esta bien reiniciar

questions.question_en: Verification photos and additive notes / doctor notes
questions.note: Links de fotos de verificacao e notas adicionais vao aqui.

valid_options.value: I have read and understand the above information and I do consent and wish to move forward with this treatment plan
I have read the above information and I do consent and wish to move forward

questions.note: completeSession do /ai-handoff costuma anexar este consent final automaticamente; mesmo assim a string exata esta abaixo.

valid_options.value: I have read and understand the above information and I wish to continue
I have read the above information and I do not wish to continue
